channel.title: The Signal — Collapse Risk Instrument
channel.description: Public figure legitimacy collapse analysis. Five variables. Real-time verdicts.

item.title: Kanye West — Stage 5: Inversion
item.description: Inversion complete. The audience didn't leave — it turned. The collapse didn't happen because of the antisemitic comments. Those were the confirmation. The crowd had already started rewriting what it believed three years earlier — when the gap between the genius myth and the visible behavior became impossible to hold together.
